notes: Pass-2 batched-streaming ESN (N=16384, B=64, K=4, density=0.02, rho=0.9, leak=0.3, lambda=1e-3, N_phi=17408) hit the 300s wall-clock cap mid-stream and was DQ'd before any ridge solve. Observed inner-step time was ~6 ms (vs spec's ~0.6 ms projection): A100 sparse-CSR @ dense (N=16384, B=64) and the per-step Uhist roll/clone dominated, yielding ~10.5 k rows/s sustained. At kill we had streamed ~3.07 M of the planned ~16 M rows (inner step 49 k / 250 k). Energy 71.6 kJ exceeds the 25 kJ spec budget and pass-1's 29.8 kJ. The spec's anticipated failure mode (sparse-batched matmul slower than projected) materialised, but per ground rules we do not retry or redesign. No val accuracy measured (training never returned a model).
